stimulus: The following text is from a fictional 2014 novella. While working on her translation of a poem written in Bengali into English, the narrator looks out the window at night to clear her thoughts. I tried to distract myself with these ordinary sights of the neighborhood before completing the final stanza of the poem.
stem: As used in the text, what does the word “completing” most nearly mean?
rationale: Choice C is correct because "completing" the final stanza means finishing it. Choice A is incorrect because destroying contradicts working on a translation. Choice B is incorrect because advertising doesn’t fit. Choice D is incorrect because rejecting contradicts the effort to translate.
